message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class TodoListApplication {
  start()
  main()
}

class ToDoListGUIController {
  <Item> todoList
  ToDoListManager tdm
  {field} - TextField fileLocationAndName
  {field} - TableView<Item> tableView
  {field} - TableColumn<Item, String> completionColumn
  {field} - TableColumn<Item, String> nameColumn
  {field} - TableColumn<Item, String> descriptionColumn
  {field} - TableColumn<Item, String> dueDateColumn
  {field} - RadioButton showAllItems
  {field} - RadioButton showIncompleteItems
  {field} - RadioButton showCompletedItems
  + changeItemViewOnRadioToggle()
  + toggleCompletionOnButtonPress()
  + removeItemFromTable()
  + clearAllItemsFromTable()
  + saveListToTextFile()
  + popupAddItemSceneOnButtonPress()
  + popupEditItemSceneOnButtonPress()
  + changeToLoadFileSceneOnButtonPress()
  + closeWindowOnExitButtonPress(MouseEvent event)
  + initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
  + loadTable(ToDoListManager tdm)
}

class ToDoListManager {
  String fileLocation
  {field} ToDoList tdl = new ToDoList()
  {field} File file = new File(getFileLocation()+ "/" + getFileName())
  + writeToFile(String file, ToDoListManager manager)
  + ToDoListManager loadToDoList(String location)
  + String getFileLocation()
  + String getFileName()
  + String createList(String title)
}

class ToDoList {
  String title
  {field} List<Item> itemList = new ArrayList<>()
  + List<Item> clearList()
  + addItem(Item newItem)
  + displayCompletedItems(List<Item> displayList)
  + displayIncompleteItems(List<Item> displayList)
}

class Item {
  String completion
  String name
  String description
  String dueDate
  + Item()
  + Item(String name, String description, String dueDate, String completion)
  + **String getName()**
  + String getDescription()
  + String getDueDate()
  + String getCompletion()
  + changeCompletion()
}

class AddItemController {
  {field} - Label errorLabel
  {field} - TextField itemName
  {field} - TextField itemDescription
  {field} - DatePicker itemDueDate
  {field} ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
  {field} Item newItem = new Item()
  + getItemInfo(MouseEvent event)
}

class EditItemController {
  {field} - Label errorLabel;
  {field} - TextField itemName;
  {field} - TextField itemDescription;
  {field} - DatePicker itemDueDate;
  {field} Item newItem = new Item();
  {field} ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager();
  + editItemInfo(MouseEvent event)
  + showItemInfo(Item selectedItem)
}

class LoadFileController {
  {field} - TextField filePath;
  {field} - Label label;
  {field} ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager();
  + getFilePath(MouseEvent event)=
}

TodoListApplication o-- ToDoListGUIController
ToDoListGUIController o-- AddItemController
ToDoListGUIController o-- EditItemController
ToDoListGUIController o-- LoadFileController
ToDoListManager o-- ToDoList
ToDoList o-- Item

@enduml
```
